meta.measurement_note: Per-call averages measured from real tool outputs against sample-project fixture (10 files, 5 TS, 19 exports, 3 dep edges). Projected to S/M/L task scales using realistic call distributions. Token estimation uses word-boundary BPE approximation (1.36x word count, conservative).

benchmark.description: A/B comparison: pre-Sprint 11 (old format) vs Sprint 11 optimized (compact modes, default flips, adaptive instructions)

audit_notes.token_estimator: 1.36x word count — slightly over-counts vs Claude tokenizer (~1.3x), making savings % conservative
audit_notes.old_format_verified: Matched against git diff 898dce8 — exact pre-commit output
audit_notes.shared_state: None — fresh DB per test run, old/new read same DB (read-only)
audit_notes.compact_mode_fairness: Old code had NO compact option. Benchmark shows best-case savings when agent uses compact=true. Without compact, savings are ~25-30% (from get_file_context changes only)
audit_notes.update_ticket_note: Shows +11 tok per call but SAVES a follow-up get_ticket call (~74-139 tok). Net savings ~60-120 tok per cycle. Benchmark is conservative here.
audit_notes.change_history: Fixture has 10 change records. Old format includes them (default=true), new skips them (default=false). Real codebases with more changes would show higher savings.

per_call_averages.change: Removed Created/Indexed timestamps, dep summaries, label prefixes. Flipped include_changes default to false.
Added compact mode: single-line phase + progress + next action.
Added compact mode: summary stats only, skips empty sections.
Adaptive: veteran mode (10+ sprints) returns pitfalls only. New teams get full guide.
Added compact mode: one-line per discovery.
Added compact mode: first/last snapshot + trend direction only.
Returns inline compact state — eliminates need for follow-up get_ticket call.

tasks.label: Small — Quick feature
tasks.description: Add helper function, wire imports, verify
tasks.reasoning: Quick feature: 30 file reads, 8 searches, 2 playbook checks, 6 ticket updates, 1 each of report/instructions/discoveries/burndown. Dominated by get_file_context (60% of calls).

tasks.label: Medium — Multi-file feature
tasks.description: New API endpoint + types + tests + sprint cycle
tasks.reasoning: Multi-file feature: 350 file reads across exploration + implementation + verification, 60 searches, 15 playbook checks (mid-sprint status), 40 ticket updates, 5 each of report/discoveries/burndown, 3 instruction lookups.

tasks.label: Large — Major refactor
tasks.description: Restructure module layer across codebase, multi-sprint
tasks.reasoning: Major refactor spanning multiple files and sprints: 1800 file reads (deep exploration + re-reads during implementation + verification), 300 searches, 60 playbook checks, 200 ticket updates, 20 each of report/discoveries/burndown, 10 instruction lookups.
